articles.title: Newly discovered PamStealer isn't your typical macOS malware
articles.content: The discovery underscores the increased effort being poured into Mac infostealers.
articles.titleZh: 新发现的PamStealer不是典型的macOS恶意软件
articles.contentZh: 这一发现凸显了加大对Mac信息窃取者的投入。

articles.title: T-Mobile moving tens of thousands of virtual machines off VMware amid lawsuit
articles.content: T-Mobile wants Broadcom to keep supporting its VMware perpetual licenses.
articles.titleZh: T-Mobile在诉讼中将数万台虚拟机从VMware中移除
articles.contentZh: T-Mobile希望Broadcom继续支持其VMware永久许可证。

articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.content: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.
articles.titleZh: 新攻击为人工智能浏览器是一个坏主意提供了另一个原因
articles.contentZh: 告诉LLM 2 + 2 = 5足以使其遵循禁止的指示。

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids
articles.content: Most Americans don't trust AI. It's proven that it doesn't know what safe toppings for pizza are. People don't even want to listen to AI music. But none of that matters for some of America's wealthy, who are turning to AI to teach their kids instead of traditional schools. Companies like Forge Prep and Alpha […]
articles.titleZh: 这个国家的一些富人正在让人工智能教他们的孩子
articles.contentZh: 大多数美国人不信任人工智能。事实证明，它不知道比萨饼的安全配料是什么。人们甚至不想听人工智能音乐。但对于一些美国富人来说，这一切都不重要，他们正在转向人工智能来教育他们的孩子，而不是传统的学校。Forge Prep和Alpha […]等公司

articles.title: Mr. Lif’s Emergency Rations EP is post-9/11 hip hop at its most daring
articles.content: There was a period in the early aughts when Definitive Jux (nee: Def Jux) seemed like it was going to be the future of hip hop. While the label featured plenty of experimental, boundary-pushing, and politically minded acts, Lif stood out as the most "conscious rapper" in the traditional sense. It was clear though, that […]
articles.titleZh: Lif先生的紧急口粮EP是9/11嘻哈之后最大胆的
articles.contentZh: 在早期， Definitive Jux （ NEE ： Def Jux ）似乎将成为嘻哈的未来。虽然该品牌拥有大量的实验性，突破界限和具有政治头脑的行为，但Lif在传统意义上脱颖而出，成为最“有意识的说唱歌手”。但很明显， […]
